text-align:center; width:128px; border-top:1px solid; border-right:1px solid;
text-align:center; width:128px; border-top:1px solid;
padding-top:20px; text-align:center; height:51px; width:41px; border-top:1px solid; border-right:1px solid;
height:51px; width:128px; border-top:1px solid; border-right:1px solid; text-align:center; justify-content:center; line-height:47px;
height:51px; width:128px; border-top:1px solid; border-right:1px solid; text-align:center; justify-content:center; line-height:47px;

t.t-if: len(o.approval_line_ids) > 0 and o.approval_line_ids.sorted(lambda x: x.sequence)[0].signature != False and o.approval_line_ids.sorted(lambda x: x.sequence)[0].is_approved == True

div.style: height:51px; width:128px; border-top:1px solid; border-right:1px solid; text-align:center; justify-content:center; line-height:47px;

t.t-if: len(o.approval_line_ids) > 0 and o.approval_line_ids.sorted(lambda x: x.sequence)[1].signature != False and o.approval_line_ids.sorted(lambda x: x.sequence)[1].is_approved == True

t.t-foreach: o.approval_line_ids.filtered(lambda l: l.is_approved == True).sorted(lambda r: r.sequence)

div.style: text-align:center; height:17px; width:41px; border-top:1px solid; border-right:1px solid;
text-align:center; width:128px; height:17px; border-top:1px solid; border-right:1px solid;
text-align:center; width:128px; height:17px; border-top:1px solid; border-right:1px solid;
text-align:center; width:128px; height:17px; border-top:1px solid;
text-align:center; height:17px; width:41px; border-top:1px solid; border-right:1px solid;
text-align:center; width:128px; height:17px; border-top:1px solid; border-right:1px solid;
text-align:center; width:128px; height:17px; border-top:1px solid; border-right:1px solid;

t.t-if: o.approval_line_ids and o.approval_line_ids.sorted(lambda x: x.sequence)[0].is_approved == True

div.style: text-align:center; width:128px; height:17px; border-top:1px solid;

t.t-if: o.approval_line_ids and o.approval_line_ids.sorted(lambda x: x.sequence)[1].is_approved == True

div.style: width:40px; border-left:1px solid;
text-align:center; width:872px; border:1px solid; border-top:0px;
div.b: PICA (PROBLEM IDENTIFICATION AND CORRECTIVE ACTION) SUPPLIER
